_comment: Copy to settings.json (gitignored) and fill in. Never commit real credentials.
_mail_server_note: Host confirmed from materials-costing config: mail.lindoservico.pt (provider mail.pt). SMTP runs on 587/STARTTLS; IMAP is normally 993/SSL on the same host. Verify the IMAP port with the provider before first run.

sync._comment: fetch + triage are incremental (UID watermark + results.jsonl gate); on_startup auto-runs one sync in the background each time `email2data serve` boots

llm._provider_options: vertex_gemini (Google Gemini on Vertex, uses gcloud ADC) | anthropic (needs api_key_env)
llm._context_cache: Vertex/Gemini: cache the large stable playbook prefix so it is not re-billed every call. min_chars ~ the model's caching floor (~1024 tokens); best-effort, falls back to the plain path on any error.

intake._comment: Conversational-intake Telegram worker (ADR-019/-020/-021). Disabled by default. The bot token lives in .env (never here); start the worker with `email2data intake-bot`.
intake._allowlist_note: Default-deny: only these Telegram user ids may use the bot. roster_owner feeds the capture's asserted_by provenance.

paths._captures_dir_note: PRECIOUS intake media (photos/audio); sibling of out/, NOT regenerable — once a capture is scrubbed from Telegram this is the sole copy, so it MUST be in the backup set (data-stores.md).
